# terrible_community_general_keycloak_user_execute_actions_email (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `actions` (String) List of required actions to include in the email.
- `auth_username` (String)
- `client_id` (String) Optional client ID used for the redirect link.
- `id` (String) The unique ID (UUID) of the user. Mutually exclusive with `username`.
- `lifespan` (Number) Optional lifespan (in seconds) for the action token (supported on newer Keycloak versions). Forwarded as query parameter if provided.
- `realm` (String) The Keycloak realm where the user resides.
- `redirect_uri` (String) Optional redirect URI. Must be valid for the given client if `client_id` is set.
- `username` (String) Username of the user. Mutually exclusive with `id`.

### Read-Only

- `user_id` (String) The user ID the email was (or would be, in check mode) sent to.
